filters.q: subject:(schedule a meeting) OR body:(schedule a meeting) is:unread

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.original_subject }} — No availability found
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.requester_name }},

Thank you for reaching out about scheduling a meeting regarding {{ $json.meeting_topic }}.

Unfortunately, I have no available slots in the next 3 business days. I will be in touch with alternative dates shortly.

Apologies for the inconvenience!

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $('Extract Meeting Details').first().json.original_subject }} — Please pick a meeting time
Re: Meeting Confirmation — Clarification Needed
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.requester_email }},

I received your reply but could not identify your preferred time slot.

Please reply with one of the following:

  • CONFIRM 1
  • CONFIRM 2
  • CONFIRM 3

Thank you!

additionalFields.description:
=Meeting scheduled via automated n8n scheduler.

Topic: {{ $json.meeting_topic }}
Requester: {{ $json.requester_name }} ({{ $json.requester_email }})
Duration: {{ $json.duration_minutes }} minutes

parameters.subject: =✅ Meeting Confirmed: {{ $json.meeting_topic }}
parameters.message:
=

✅ Meeting Confirmed!

Hi {{ $json.requester_name }},

Your meeting has been successfully booked. Here are the details:

📋 Topic{{ $json.meeting_topic }}
📅 Date & Time{{ $json.confirmed_slot.display }}
⏱ Duration{{ $json.duration_minutes }} minutes
🎥 Meeting LinkJoin Google Meet
📅 CalendarView Calendar Event
A Google Calendar invite has been sent to your email. Please accept it to add the meeting to your calendar.

Looking forward to speaking with you!

This is an automated confirmation from the meeting scheduler.
